title: Spicy Flaky Slovakian Turmeric Powder Stir-fry
description: A one-pot vegan-friendly dish featuring spicy turmeric powder with a flaky texture, ideal for quick weeknight meals.

ingredients.name: 2 cups mixed vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, carrots, onions)
2 tbsp soy sauce (or tamari for vegan option)

instructions: Heat a large pan over medium heat. Add turmeric powder and black pepper flakes to the pan and cook for about 30 seconds.
Add cashews, mixed vegetables, soy sauce (or tamari), garlic, and lime juice. Stir well until evenly coated with the spices.
Stir-fry everything together for another 5 minutes or until the vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Fold in tofu cubes into the pan. Continue to stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes until all ingredients are heated through and the dish is nicely spiced and flavorful.
